articles.title: The Bastl Kalimba is a wild synth that thinks it’s a thumb piano
articles.description: Make no mistake, the Bastl Kalimba is a synthesizer, you just play it like a kalimba. Its tines don't really make much sound. There is an internal mic that you can blend in for a little acoustic spice, but it's mostly driven by the synth engine that combines physical modeling and FM. The tines are […]
articles.author: Terrence O’Brien

articles.title: Ashnymph’s Childhood EP is exhilarating dance goth rock
articles.description: I've got to thank my oldest friend and concert buddy, Tim, for turning me on to this one. Ashnymph is a London band that blends post-punk melodies with Krautrock rhythms and industrial grime. Their debut EP, Childhood, drifts between dreamy vocals buried in layers of reverb and four-on-the-floor dancefloor pounding. It's a thrilling opening salvo […]
articles.author: Terrence O’Brien

articles.title: Cricut’s $99 craft cutting machine helped me feel creative again
articles.description: I've always been skeptical of products that claim to help you lead a more creative life. But one recently won me over. I've spent three weeks with the Cricut Joy 2, a smart cutting and drawing machine that made it easy for me to get back into making stickers, cards, bookmarks, and more. The small […]
articles.author: Sheena Vasani

articles.title: Writers are fleeing the Substack Tax
articles.description: Substack, the once buzzy newsletter platform, is losing a new swath of writers to rival platforms most people haven't heard of. Just last month, The Ankler, one of Substack's most popular publications, left for a platform that gives it more control over its site. Others who have departed Substack within the past year voiced similar […]
articles.author: Emma Roth

articles.title: Netflix may have finally figured out games
articles.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on Netflix, follow Andrew Webster. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started Boggle has become a spectator sport in my household. Everyone crowds around the […]
articles.author: Andrew Webster

articles.title: Vivo’s X300 Ultra has the best cameras in any phone
articles.description: A few months ago, I wrote that the telephoto camera is the only lens that matters any more, at least when it comes to Ultra-class flagships. As phones got better, cameras became where manufacturers tried to stand out. As cameras got better, telephoto lenses became the next point of focus. The most recent Ultra phones […]
articles.author: Dominic Preston
